name: Private Fairway Farmington
about: Private Fairway Farmington is a 24-hour indoor golf facility offering members unlimited access to a private golf studio equipped with TrackMan technology. The venue provides a complete private environment for individuals and their guests to practice, play, and improve their golf game. Memberships include options for unlimited monthly access or punch passes with a set number of sessions available over six months. The facility is designed for convenient, self-service operation with key fob access and an easy-to-use booking app.
why_golfers_like_it: Complete privacy in a dedicated bay with no waiting or crowds
Access to TrackMan 4 technology providing 26 data points for every swing
Unlimited 24-hour access with flexible monthly memberships
Option to play on 100+ hyper-accurate mapped courses including Pebble Beach and St. Andrews

food_and_drink.notes: Members can order food delivery services like DoorDash to the studio.

simulator_hardware.notes: PGA Tour-level radar launch monitor with 26 data points and 3 video angles per swing.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue expects you to bring your own clubs to use with the TrackMan system.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, members can order food from services like DoorDash to be delivered to the studio. Alcohol is not mentioned as being available.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The content does not specify a typical time for an 18-hole round on the simulator.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There is no specific information provided about whether the venue is kid-friendly or has amenities for children.
